name: Kingdom Tales 2: Viking Saga
short_description: Enjoy the story of true love and devotion while exploring, gathering resources, producing, trading, building, repairing and working for the well-being of your people! But, watch out! Greedy count Oli and his spies never sleep!
detailed_description:
In this fun and colorful city builder - time management strategy game you will join the expedition of king's builders and architects on their noble quest!

Enjoy the story of true love and devotion while exploring, gathering resources, producing, trading, building, repairing and working for the well-being of your people! But, watch out! Greedy count Oli and his spies never sleep!

🎯 Dozens of levels packed with city building fun

🏰 Build, upgrade, and defend your towns

⚡ Use powerful boosts & unlock achievements

🎧 Intriguing narrative — a plot with twists and memorable characters.

🛠️ 3 difficulty levels – from relaxed exploration to true challenge.

📴 Play completely offline — anytime, anywhere

🔒 No data collection — your privacy is safe

🕹 Gameplay

Click / Tap to gather resources, build houses, manage workers, and keep your people thriving as you progress through each level. Use boosts when things get tough — but the real reward is mastering strategy and efficiency!

🎮 Play your way

Expand, optimize, upgrade, and develop your settlements the way you like. Customizable challenge — Relaxed, Standard, and Extreme difficulty modes. Earn Achievements as you complete objectives and perfect your strategy.

🌌 Immersive adventure

The mix of colorful art, atmosphere, and story-rich progression paired with satisfying time-management and city-building mechanics. Whether you enjoy calm, casual resource gathering or intense strategic challenges — this game delivers both.

  • HELP Finn and Dalla, the two young "love-birds" reunite

  • MASTER the 40 EXCITING levels

  • MEET peculiar and funny characters along the way

  • OUTSMART the greedy count Oli and his spies

  • BUILD the prosperous kingdom for all of your subjects

  • PLAY wheel of fortune

  • 3 DIFFICULTY MODES: relaxed, timed and extreme

  • Step-by-step TUTORIALS for beginners

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
